commands.review_summary:
The PR moves Feishu quoted-message fetching before the empty-message guard and only skips when current text, media, and quoted content are all empty.

PR surface: Source +4. Total +4 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main strips the bot mention from content, then the empty-message guard returns before `getMessageFeishu` can fetch `parentId` content. I did not run a live Feishu reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR should stay open for normal review while the contributor supplies real Feishu behavior proof or maintainers explicitly accept the proof gap.

target.title: fix(feishu): fetch quoted content before empty-message guard
target.body:
## Summary

Fix #90177 — Feishu group reply with only `@bot` gets dropped before quoted content is fetched.

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed**: Feishu group reply with only `@bot` mention (no additional text) is no longer dropped before quoted content is fetched. The empty-message guard now runs after fetching the quoted parent message.

**Real environment tested**: Ubuntu 22.04, OpenClaw `main` (ce0d5117bf), Node 22.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**: `pnpm test extensions/feishu` — all 854 Feishu message handling tests pass. `pnpm build:ci-artifacts` — build succeeds. `pnpm ui:build` — UI build succeeds.

**After-fix evidence**: All Feishu plugin tests pass (854/855). The 1 pre-existing failure is a localization string mismatch in `setup-surface.test.ts`, unrelated to this change.

```
 ✓ |extension-feishu| 66 files passed  (854 tests)
 Test Files  1 failed | 66 passed (67)
      Tests  1 failed | 854 passed (855)
```

The fix reorders message processing so that `getMessageFeishu` (quoted content fetch) runs before the empty-message guard. The guard now checks `!quotedContent?.trim()` alongside `!ctx.content.trim()` and `mediaList.length === 0`.

**Observed result after fix**: Before: `skipping empty message (no text, no media)` — event dropped before quoted fetch. After: Quoted content is fetched first; only skipped if current text, media, AND quoted content are all empty.

## Out-of-scope follow-ups

Live Feishu E2E test (requires Feishu bot credentials). The fix is a logic reorder that exactly matches the root cause and minimal fix direction described in the issue.

Fixes #90177
